title: festuca longifolia var. trachyphylla
intro: Festuca longifolia var. trachyphylla, also known as tall fescue, is a type of grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of tall fescue include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Tall fescue can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
